name: meetily-codex-bridge
description: Codex wrappers for the repo-local agents commands and workflows used by Meetily.

interface.shortDescription: Use Meetily repo-local agent workflows from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Provides Codex-facing wrappers for Meetily's canonical .agents commands and workflows. AGENTS.md and nearest AGENTS.md files remain the source of truth for codebase context routing.
defaultPrompt: Use the Meetily agent workflow for this task.
Use /review-and-fix before wrapping up substantive work.
